Package jline.lang.distributions

Class HyperExp

java.lang.Object
jline.lang.distributions.Distribution
jline.lang.distributions.MarkovianDistribution
jline.lang.distributions.HyperExp
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
public class HyperExp extends MarkovianDistribution implements Serializable
